# Aeon Recursion Tower

Parent: [Gnosis](../README.md)

Open-source package support files for the Aeon Recursion Tower module.

## Key Files

- `CASCADE_BENCH_RESULTS.md`: Local documentation file.
- `decimation-cascade-bench.mjs`: Script or runtime helper.
- `recursion-tower.mjs`: Script or runtime helper.
- `TWO_WITNESS_RESULTS.md`: Local documentation file.
- `two-witness-bench.mjs`: Script or runtime helper.

## Usage

Use this README as the local map for this directory. Keep implementation details near the owning source files, and update this document when the directory contract changes.

## Verification

Run the closest package or app-level check through the repository-owned `a0` or `monster` target after changing behavior in this directory.
